## Outcome

Describe the user-facing or data-pipeline result.

## Scope

- [ ] Application behavior
- [ ] Design or accessibility
- [ ] Data ingestion or schema
- [ ] Curation or publication
- [ ] Documentation or packaging

## Data impact

State whether source values, identifiers, provenance, schema, or generated outputs are
affected. Use `None` when the change is presentation-only.

## Verification

- [ ] Unit and integration tests pass
- [ ] Ruff and compilation checks pass
- [ ] Launcher syntax checks pass
- [ ] Live interface checked at mobile, tablet, and desktop widths when applicable
- [ ] No raw data, generated database, secret, cache, or personal path is included

## Notes

List compatibility, migration, attribution, or release considerations.
